{{Quote|I'm in!|Maggie|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 99">[[Star Wars (1977) 99|''Star Wars'' (1977) 99]]</ref>}}
'''Maggie''' was a former [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] who defected and joined the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] as a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Officer/Legends|officer]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Maggie served as both a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and a soldier during the [[Nagai–Tof War]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], she traveled to the planet [[Godo]] to investigate a [[Godoan's disease|strange plague]] that was affecting the [[Godoan/Legends|native inhabitants]]. Later, she was part of a small team sent to infiltrate the [[Tof/Legends|Tof]] base on [[Saijo/Legends|Saijo]] during the [[Battle of Saijo|last battle]] of the war.
